_status: PLACEHOLDER — populate when the deployed app starts emitting telemetry.
events_logged: TBD — typical set will include: user_session_started, agent_turn_started, agent_turn_completed, tool_called (per tool), error, latency_p50, latency_p99
no_pii_rule: Telemetry MUST NOT include user message contents, agent response contents, or any user PII. Only structural metadata. Same rule as the Hub's app instance.

destination.otlp_endpoint: ${OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT} (from the deployment platform's env vars, NOT the local repo .env)

pattern_detection_triggers: TBD — define when the product's typical user-shaped requests are known.
